description_long: This trash bin features a square, open-top design with a rigid white metal wire frame forming a grid around all sides. The interior and exterior are lined with a brown, fabric-like material that appears slightly wrinkled and loosely fitted within the frame. The top edge is reinforced with a thicker band of the same brown material, providing structure and preventing collapse. The bin is deep and capacious, suitable for collecting large volumes of waste in public or communal spaces. There are no visible handles, wheels, or lid mechanisms, and the base is flat, allowing it to rest stably on the ground. One side displays faint blue markings, possibly faded signage or labeling.
description: A square, open-top trash bin with a white metal wire grid frame and a brown, fabric-like liner. The bin is deep, sturdy, and unadorned except for faint blue markings on one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open top, white wire grid, and brown liner with a reinforced rim; no visible markings.
description_view_1: This side displays faint blue markings on the brown liner, possibly indicating signage or labeling.
description_view_2: Opposite side with a slightly uneven rim and no visible markings; the wire grid and liner are clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view with a continuous wire grid and brown liner, no visible markings or features.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Faint blue markings on one side, no clear signage or labels
